what: Verify git credentials are configured for vault operations
why: Vault pull/push requires git authentication — validate SSH keys or token
output: Git credential status including authentication method detected

event.message: Git credentials are configured and valid

error_handling.criteria: No SSH key found in standard locations (~/.ssh/)
error_handling.action: Guide user to setup SSH key

event.message: No SSH key found — please configure SSH for git access

error_handling.criteria: Git authentication token exists but has expired

event.message: Git authentication token has expired — please refresh your credentials

decisions.outcome: Flag for self-heal or user guidance
Flag for self-heal or user guidance
